description: User clicks the 'Select' button for the first flight result (Qantas/Emirates) on the Skyscanner search results page.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue 'Select' button for the top flight result.

description: The selected flight result expands to show more detailed information and specific booking options.
frame_description: The flight result card expands vertically, revealing additional details.

description: User scrolls down the page to review other flight results.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: User hovers the cursor over various filter options in the left sidebar, specifically looking at the 'Stops' and 'Baggage' sections.
frame_description: The cursor moves slowly over the filter options on the left side of the screen.

description: User clicks the '2+ stops' checkbox to filter the results.
frame_description: The cursor is over the checkbox for '2+ stops' in the sidebar.

description: A 'Searching...' loading overlay appears, and then the results update to show that no flights match the selected filters.
frame_description: A semi-transparent overlay with a loading spinner and the text 'Searching...' is visible over the results area.

description: User clicks the '2+ stops' checkbox again to re-enable those flights in the search results.
frame_description: The cursor is back over the '2+ stops' checkbox.

description: The 'Searching...' overlay appears again, and the original flight results are restored to the page.
frame_description: The loading overlay appears and then disappears as the flight results reload.

description: User scrolls down the sidebar to view more filter categories like 'Airlines'.
frame_description: The sidebar content scrolls down.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the Skyscanner search results page.
frame_description: The page content moves downwards as the user scrolls up.

description: User switches to a different browser tab, which is the Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen content changes from Skyscanner to the Google search page.

description: User clicks on the Trello shortcut icon on the Google new tab page.
frame_description: The cursor is over a Trello icon in the shortcuts section of the Google page.

description: The browser navigates to Trello and the dashboard begins to load.
frame_description: A white screen with the Trello logo and a loading animation is visible.

description: The Trello dashboard finishes loading, displaying the user's workspaces and boards.
frame_description: The Trello dashboard interface is fully rendered.

description: User clicks on the 'Japan' board card to open it.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Japan' board card in the 'Your boards' section.

description: The browser navigates to the Japan trip board on Trello.
frame_description: The screen shows the loading state for the specific Trello board.

description: The content of the Japan board, including lists and cards, is rendered.
frame_description: The Trello board with multiple lists and cards is visible.

description: User scrolls horizontally to the right to see more lists on the Trello board.
frame_description: The board content moves to the left as the user scrolls horizontally.

description: User switches back to the Skyscanner tab.
frame_description: The screen content switches back to the Skyscanner search results.

description: User switches back to the Google tab.
frame_description: The screen content switches back to the Google page.

description: User navigates to Booking.com.
frame_description: The browser loads the Booking.com homepage.
